Vocabulary - रजतदर्पणः | Story 15

02 May 2021 | Sanskrit Sanskrit-Stories Sanskrit-Vocabulary

Image from Telegram Channel - kathaaH कथाः

Meanings from - Learnsanskrit.cc

Sanskrit Word English Meaning
नितराम् by all means / wholly
स्थापनीय to be kept
परितः on all sides
आहूय having invited
प्रवृत्त busy with
परिष्कार polish / finish
उद्यत prepared / ready for
क्षन्तव्य to be pardoned or forgiven
प्रमाद carelessness
अद्यावधि from or till to-day
उपायन gift
दत्त्वा having given

Note - All meanings are from the above mentioned website. If there is any mistake, do inform.
